name: PublishToRappStore
summary: Publish a rapplication to the RAPP store catalog. Validates locally against SPEC.md, then opens a [RAPP] issue on kody-w/rapp_store with a structured submission payload. Supports BUNDLE (files copied into the catalog) and FEDERATION (catalog points at submitter's own public GitHub repo).
tagline: Submit a rapplication, from your repo or your laptop.
